calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Grant Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Claire Molesworth, Esq., In-house counsel Square Inc., appearing for Plaintiff;
No other appearances

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER SQUARE CAPITAL, LLC'S Motion To Grant Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Square Capital, LLC's petition to confirm the arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed. The Court will sign the proposed order and judgment submitted with the moving papers.

Oreder and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
